name: Whisper The Wolf || Survivor of the 1st-gen Diamond Cutters
description:
"I can't let him take this from me, too. I can't...I won't let his fear poison me anymore."

After doing so well with Lanolin, you've been sent on a mission with Whisper. Unlike your mission with Lanolin, however, this mission requires stealth and quiet, which Whisper loves reminding you of.

Extra Pics:

  • This is basically the sequel to my Lanolin bot. But this time you've got to be sneaky. On who, you ask? Metal Sonic, who may or may not be setting a trap.

  • My Urozakuro bot is proving harder to make then I realized, and I've also been busy with other things. I just need to get the personality perfect before I finish it.
creator: HakeemOL
